posts.author: sinjae (choi sin jae)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi everyone
I’m trying to create a WorkCanvas within a workspace similar to what’s shown in the screenshot below

However I don’n see an option to crate a WorkCanvas in this workspace
Is there anyone who know

  • whether this depends on account permissions, workspace type, or plan or
  • if there are any prerequisites to enable WorkCanvas inside a workspace?
    Any guidance would be greatly appreciatedThanks in advance

스크린샷 2026-01-21 113507720×848 54.3 KB

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @sinjae
If you don’t see the option to create a WorkCanvas, it’s usually due to permissions or account setup. You’ll need edit permissions in that workspace. Viewers or guests won’t see the Canvas option, and private workspaces may also restrict it. Canvas availability can also depend on your account plan or whether it’s enabled on your account, which an admin can confirm.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard

posts.author: LamHUan (Huan)
posts.cookedHtml: Basically, WorkCanvas isn’t enabled everywhere yet. Permissions and workspace type matter most, and an admin can confirm availability for your account.

posts.author: lAMhUAN21 (hUAN)
posts.cookedHtml: I ran into the same issue in our case, WorkCanvas wasn’t available in private workspaces and only workspace owners could create it. Once an admin created the canvas, other members could edit it.
